arts.ttl: PSG reward Luis Enrique with 2-year extension
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain announced on Friday that it has extended coach Luis Enrique's contract until 2027.

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s €37.5K-Per-Week Target May Elude Tottenham, West Ham as PSG Are Urged to Move
arts.sum: With Randal Kolo Muani now at Juventus, Paris Saint-Germain are looking to offload the French striker permanently, whether to the Turin club or another team. As a result, PSG will likely target a No. 9 this summer. They’ve already been linked with several strikers, including 21-year-old Jhon Durán, who moved to Al-Nassr during the winter […] The post Newcastle’s €37.5K-Per-Week Target May Elude Tottenham, West Ham as PSG Are Urged to Move appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | PSG 4-1 Monaco: Kvaratskhelia opens account for Parisians and Dembélé scores double
arts.sum: With Paris Saint-Germain’s lead at the top of Ligue 1 verging on unassailable, what would usually have been a high-stakes clash between two of France’s major players may well have…

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia scores his first PSG goal as Ligue 1 leader routs Monaco
arts.sum: He showed a bit of both in the 54th minute, controlling a quick pass with his right foot, cutting cleverly inside Christian Mawissa and scooping the ball off balance over goalkeeper Radoslaw Majecki. PSG led in the sixth minute when Vitinha curled a free kick into the bottom right corner.

arts.ttl: Video: Watch Ousmane Dembélé Extend Hot Streak with Brace vs. Monaco
arts.sum: Since the calendar turned to 2025, Ousmane Dembélé has become a goal-scoring machine. The Frenchman has scored 13 goals in the new year and two of those goals came on Friday night against AS Monaco at the Parc des Princes. On the first goal, combined with Désiré Doué in the box and fired past Radosław […] The post Video: Watch Ousmane Dembélé Extend Hot Streak with Brace vs. Monaco appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Video: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia Pulls Fabulous Fake to Score First PSG Goal Against Monaco
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia scored his first Paris Saint-Germain goal on Friday night at the Parc des Princes. After ending the first half one-all, the Ligue 1 leaders put on their scoring boots in the second half to take the lead over Monaco. Kvaratskhelia performed an exceptional fake shot that sent Christian Mawissa to the ground before […] The post Video: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia Pulls Fabulous Fake to Score First PSG Goal Against Monaco appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG Told to Go All In on £150M-Rated Newcastle Talent to Beat Liverpool, Arsenal
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and Alexander Isak will be staying at Newcastle United. While there wasn’t much talk about a move this winter, it’s clear that several clubs will be targeting him come summer. For now, the Magpies are working on a contract extension to keep Isak at St. James’ Park for the […] The post PSG Told to Go All In on £150M-Rated Newcastle Talent to Beat Liverpool, Arsenal appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Video: Watch Vitinha Score a Surprising Stunning Free Kick Against Monaco
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain opened the scoring early in their Ligue 1 clash against AS Monaco on Friday night at the Parc des Princes. The Parisians will be looking to secure a win to ride positive momentum heading into their UEFA Champions League clash against Stade Brestois. arts.ttl: Official | Luis Enrique extends PSG contract
arts.sum: Luis Enrique has extended his contract as PSG head coach, the Ligue 1 leaders have announced. The Spaniard has put pen to paper on a contract set to expire in…

arts.ttl: Official | Nuno Mendes, Achraf Hakimi and Vitinha sign PSG contract extensions
arts.sum: PSG have announced this Friday that three of their key players – right-back Achraf Hakimi (26), left-back Nuno Mendes (22) and midfielder Vitinha (24) – have signed long-term contract extensions.…
